text: That's only 1 iteration — the proxy captured from a different session. Let me find the right run:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "ls -dt /tmp/claude_captures/run_* | head -5 && echo \"---\" && for d in $(ls -dt /tmp/claude_captures/run_* | head -5); do echo \"$(basename $d): $(ls $d | grep '_summary.txt$' | grep -v response | wc -l) iterations\"; done", "description": "Find the right run"}
